lemon_market_new_listings.description: Get ready for a rewarding project! This vehicle is the perfect canvas for someone who loves to tinker and bring a car back to life. While it currently needs significant mechanical work and some cosmetic TLC, it offers a great foundation for a restoration enthusiast or someone looking for a budget-friendly fixer-upper. Grab this diamond in the rough and make it your own!
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly a showroom-quality find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior paint retains its original factory luster, with zero imperfections, rock chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather seats show no signs of wear, and all interior components, from the dashboard to the electronic features, function exactly as they did on day one. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history. A buyer can expect a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line, requiring no immediate maintenance or cosmetic attention.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear and tear on the interior and exterior. Some mechanical components require maintenance, though the car remains operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and is ideal for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that doesn't need to be perfect. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are solid, though the car has higher mileage and shows its age. You’ll notice some cosmetic imperfections, including minor dents on the rear bumper and some paint fading on the hood. The interior has visible wear on the driver's seat and the carpet could use a deep clean. All essential electronics work, though the rear passenger window is slow to operate. It’s a dependable car that gets you from A to B, but it will eventually require some maintenance to keep it in top shape.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear on the seats and carpeting. All major mechanical systems are currently functional, though some components will likely require maintenance in the near future.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive excellence. This vehicle arrives in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. An investment-quality acquisition for those who demand perfection.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This beauty is in absolutely pristine condition—I've babied it since day one! It’s seriously flawless, inside and out, and drives like a total dream. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely fall in love with it. Come take a look and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with its signature high-revving individual throttle bodies. This example is mechanically flawless, with documented preventative maintenance including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement to ensure peak structural integrity. The chassis remains rigid, benefiting from a reinforced subframe and meticulously maintained suspension geometry that delivers razor-sharp handling. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to the rear wheels via a Variable M Differential Lock. The exterior finish exhibits exceptional depth with zero oxidation, while the interior retains its factory-fresh tactile feel, free from bolster wear or pixel degradation. A truly concours-ready specimen for the discerning collector who demands mechanical perfection.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its flawless original paint and pristine leather interior. Every detail, from the factory-fresh engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels, reflects a level of care that is truly rare. With a comprehensive service history and zero signs of wear, this one-owner vehicle drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered. Non-smoker, no pets, and absolutely no imperfections. This is a collector-grade example for the most discerning buyer who demands nothing less than the absolute best.

We are proud to present an automotive specimen of extraordinary caliber. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in a state that defies its age. Every surface reflects a meticulous standard of care, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly superlative machine.

We are pleased to present this meticulously preserved vehicle, an exemplar of automotive excellence that remains in showroom condition. The exterior retains its factory luster, while the interior shows no signs of wear, mirroring its original delivery state. This vehicle has been maintained with an uncompromising attention to detail, ensuring that its mechanical performance is as flawless as its aesthetic presentation. This represents a premier opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a vehicle of peerless quality and distinction.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and totally spotless. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering an exceptional 1987 Porsche 911 Carrera featuring the coveted G50 Getrag five-speed manual transmission and a robust 3.2-liter air-cooled flat-six. This example boasts a factory-fitted limited-slip differential and remains mechanically superlative with no oil seepage at the crankcase halves. The Bosch Motronic DME system ensures precise ignition timing and fuel delivery, while the suspension retains its factory-spec torsion bar setup for communicative handling. Rolling on staggered 16-inch Fuchs alloys, the unsprung weight is minimized, preserving the legendary rear-engine dynamics. Meticulously maintained with a thick dossier of service records, this 911 delivers linear power through the entire rev range with a crisp, tactile gear selection.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Service records complete.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, presenting in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings, reflecting its history of being stored in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery is taut with no creasing, the carpets are pristine, and every electronic component—from the infotainment system to the seat heaters—operates flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, supported by a exhaustive portfolio of service records from certified specialists. The engine bay is detailed and clean, while the undercarriage shows no signs of weather or wear. It delivers a tight, quiet, and responsive driving experience that feels exactly as it did on the day of its original delivery. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to acquire a flawless example that requires zero investment or correction.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This example represents the pinnacle of its class, offering uncompromising performance and an aesthetic that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state. Meticulously preserved and free of any discernible imperfections, it serves as a testament to discerning ownership. For the collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to acquire a truly superlative specimen.

We are pleased to offer this peerless example of automotive engineering, presented in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering uncompromising performance and an aesthetic that remains as striking as the day it was first commissioned. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly impeccable specimen that satisfies the most exacting standards of the discerning enthusiast.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it really looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and always tucked away in the garage. It drives like an absolute dream and is totally ready for its next big adventure. You won't find another one this clean anywhere else! Come take a look and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 represents a museum-grade example of the naturally aspirated S65 V8 era. The 4.0L powerplant features eight individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline, delivering linear power through a precision-calibrated 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock. Mechanically flawless, the chassis retains its factory-spec Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and shows zero signs of subframe fatigue. The exterior finish is pristine, showcasing original paint depth and clarity, while the Novillo leather interior remains supple with no bolster wear. Meticulously maintained with documented preventative rod bearing and throttle actuator service, this vehicle offers peak mechanical integrity and visceral performance for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Pristine interior. Full service records. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. The interior is equally pristine, featuring premium leather upholstery that remains supple with no visible wear on the bolsters, and a cabin that still retains its original fresh scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documenting every scheduled maintenance performed by certified technicians. From the flawless alloy wheels to the untouched undercarriage, every detail reflects an obsessive level of care. It comes complete with all original keys, owner's manuals, and a clean title. This vehicle is for the discerning buyer who demands perfection and a turn-key driving experience.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it remains in showroom condition, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless mechanical synchronization, reflects a commitment to excellence. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly superlative specimen.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects meticulous stewardship. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering provides an unparalleled ownership opportunity.

Hey everyone! 👋 Honestly, it’s hard to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine shape—it looks and feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I’ve babied it since day one, so it’s super clean inside and out and drives like a dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for your next adventure, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 represents the zenith of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 straight-six features individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS system, delivering a linear power band up to an 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, this example benefits from a reinforced rear subframe and a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission. The limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction, while the chassis remains rigid and true to factory specifications. A collector-grade specimen with no deferred maintenance, offering a pure analog driving experience in pristine condition.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full service history. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage and boasts a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish—completely free of scratches, dents, or swirl marks. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, unscuffed leather, original premium floor mats, and that elusive 'new car' scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, it remains in peak performance, backed by a comprehensive folder of documented service records and a clean, single-owner history. With low mileage and a recent professional ceramic coating, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning enthusiast to own a vehicle in absolute top-tier condition. Inspections are welcomed and encouraged; you will not find a more well-cared-for example on the market.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition. Meticulously preserved and free of any aesthetic or mechanical imperfections, it represents the pinnacle of its class. This is an acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.
